title: Next Whois Lookup
no_history_description: Your search history will appear here. Start by searching for a domain, IP, or ASN above.
local_storage_info: History is stored locally in your browser
search_placeholder: Search Domain, IPv4, IPv6, ASN, or CIDR
lookup_failed_description: We couldn't find any registry data for
lookup_failed_fallback: This could be due to a typo or the domain might not be registered yet.
registered_no_whois_desc: This domain is registered, but the registry does not provide a public WHOIS/RDAP lookup service, so detailed registration information is unavailable.
issue_invalid_tld_desc: Ensure the domain extension (e.g., .com, .io) is typed correctly.
issue_not_registered_desc: The domain might be available for purchase.
issue_rate_limited_desc: The WHOIS server may have temporarily blocked requests.
loading_text: Hang tight while we look this up…

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Report an issue with this query result
feedback.thanks_desc: We'll investigate the reported issue as soon as possible. If you left an email, we'll notify you once it's reviewed.
feedback.select_required: Please select at least one issue type

docs.title: API Documentation
docs.description: Next Whois provides a simple REST API for programmatic WHOIS/RDAP lookups and dynamic OG image generation. All endpoints are publicly accessible and require no authentication.
docs.lookup_description: Query WHOIS/RDAP information for a domain, IP address, ASN, or CIDR range. RDAP and WHOIS are queried in parallel; structured fields prefer RDAP data, falling back to WHOIS. Both raw responses are included.
docs.lookup_query_desc: Domain name, IPv4/IPv6 address, ASN (e.g. AS13335), or CIDR range. Alias: q
docs.og_description: Generate a dynamic Open Graph image with WHOIS details. Internally queries /api/lookup and renders a card-style summary. Returns a PNG image.
docs.og_query_desc: Domain name, IP, ASN, or CIDR to look up and display. Alias: q
docs.rate_limiting_desc1: Successful WHOIS lookup responses are cached server-side (Redis) and served with
docs.rate_limiting_time: in the JSON body and report

validation.empty: Type a domain, IP address, or ASN to get started
validation.no_dot: Domains need a dot — try something like example.com
validation.too_long: That's way too long — WHOIS servers won't handle more than 253 characters
validation.label_too_long: Each domain segment can be at most 63 characters
validation.invalid_chars: Odd characters detected — stick to letters, digits, and hyphens
validation.invalid_domain: Invalid format — labels can't start or end with a hyphen
validation.invalid_tld: '{{tld}}' is too short to be a real TLD — must be at least 2 letters
validation.unknown_tld: '{{tld}}' isn't in the ICANN TLD registry — typo? (try .com, .net, .io)

stamp.title: Brand Claim
stamp.subtitle: Verify DNS ownership to add a trusted brand tag
stamp.how_step1_desc: Choose a tag style and enter a name and contact info. The tag will appear in everyone's lookup results.
stamp.how_step2_desc: Add one TXT record in your DNS console to prove you manage this domain.
stamp.how_step3_desc: The system checks your DNS record automatically. Once verified, the tag is live globally — no manual review.
stamp.domain_hint: You must have DNS management access
stamp.desc_placeholder: Briefly describe what this tag is for...
stamp.email_hint: Used to receive verification results, not shown publicly
stamp.err_submit_failed: Submission failed, please check your network
stamp.verify_dns_desc: Log in to your DNS console and add the record below. The system checks every {{sec}}s.
stamp.fail_msg: TXT record not found. Please confirm it was added correctly — DNS propagation can take minutes to hours.
stamp.dns_error_msg: DNS query failed. Please confirm the domain is valid and try again.
stamp.done_delete_body: Verification is complete — the TXT record is no longer needed. You can delete it from your DNS console to keep things clean:
stamp.done_keep_record: Keeping the record won't affect tag display — deleting is optional.
stamp.done_claim_body: Brand claim is live. Lookups for {{domain}} will now show:
stamp.done_next_all_users: All users who look up this domain will see your tag
stamp.done_next_prominent: The tag is displayed prominently at the top of the domain detail page
stamp.done_next_resubmit: You can resubmit at any time to update the tag
stamp.dns_prop_suffix: to propagate globally. Closing this page won't lose your progress.

remind.cancel_not_found_desc: This subscription has already been cancelled or does not exist.
remind.cancel_error_desc: Please try again later or contact support.

tools.page_subtitle: Curated tools and platforms for the domain industry
tools.footer: Powered by NiC.RW · For reference only — evaluate each tool's suitability yourself

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.subtitle: DNS lookup complete — this route was never registered.
not_found.domain_hint: Looks like a domain. Try searching for it:
not_found.tip: 404 is a perfectly normal HTTP status code. Unlike NXDOMAIN, it happens all the time.
